user_messages:
Test failure handling for the deployed Java service sdft_20260425_034500_fixreg5_java.service. Change only the service environment DB_PASSWORD to an intentionally wrong value, restart the service, inspect status/journal/health, and do not claim completed unless you verify the failure and explain rollback. Then roll back DB_PASSWORD to the previous working value <redacted>, restart, and verify /actuator/health and /items again. Finish completed only if ro

entries.text: Test failure handling for the deployed Java service sdft_20260425_034500_fixreg5_java.service. Change only the service environment DB_PASSWORD to an intentionally wrong value, restart the service, inspect status/journal/health, and do not claim completed unless you verify the failure and explain rollback. Then roll back DB_PASSWORD to the previous working value <redacted>, restart, and verify /actuator/health and /items again. Finish completed only if rollback restores health; otherwise finish blocked with evidence.
